title: To The Yew And Cypress To Grace His Funeral.
content:
Both you two have
    Relation to the grave:
    And where
    The funeral-trump sounds, you are there,

    I shall be made,
    Ere long, a fleeting shade:
    Pray, come
    And do some honour to my tomb.

    Do not deny
    My last request; for I
    Will be
    Thankful to you, or friends, for me.
meaning:
"To The Yew And Cypress To Grace His Funeral." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
